name: Cinnamon Breakfast Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Melted butter or butter substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and baking powder, then salt together.
2. Add brown sugar; mix in shortening with 2 spatulas until crumbly.
3. Add egg and sufficient milk to form a soft dough.
4. Mix in raisins.
5. Place the batter in a well-oiled and floured cake tin.
6. Pour melted butter over the top of the cake.
7. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons sugar and cinnamon.
8. Bake in a hot oven (435°F) for 20-25 minutes.
